intro: Explore dungeons, capture monsters, and win hearts in a dangerous yet sweet adventure… where the real danger is falling in love.
description:
Are you ready to dive into dungeons full of danger… and unexpected dates?

In Dungeon of Love, every battle can change your destiny. The monsters you capture won’t just fight by your side—they might reveal their human forms… and become your ideal partner.

♥ Explore, conquer, and fall in love
Face wild creatures and discover what lies behind each magical girl.
From a shy sorceress to a brave warrior, every character has a unique personality and a story that will draw you in.
Choose carefully who to pursue—your next dream partner may be waiting in the depths of the dungeon!

♥ Upgrade your hideout and get ready for action
When you're not fighting or flirting, spend your time strengthening your base. Earn money, upgrade your gear, and find a cosy spot to rest… and maybe run into someone special.

♥ Step into her world and uncover her secrets
Each girl has her own tastes, hidden pasts, and special moments with you.

Chat, go on dates, unlock unique memories, and experience a romance that evolves with every decision you make.


Key Features:

• Dynamic, challenging turn-based combat with a seductive twist.
• An unforgettable cast: girls with captivating personalities.
• Management and customisation: upgrade your hideout, organise your space, and prepare for any challenge.
• Affinity and dating system: every choice and conversation can bring you closer (or push you away) from true love.
• Multiple romantic endings: discover which love story will be yours.

In Dungeon of Love, just when you think the adventure is over… it’s only beginning—and that’s when your heart truly enters the game.

DO YOU DARE?
